data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Adobe’s design minimizes choices to improve user decision speed.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interface design optimizes button sizes and placements for easy interaction.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is chunked to enhance memory retention of information.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistent interface design aligning with user expectations.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Visually groups related items to enhance interface navigation.
